text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>! Thanks for<n>inviting me out
today!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: So what are we doing today?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
A hike? You mean in the woods or<n>something? I
go there often for<n>training.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: That sounds good to me. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
We're really deep into the woods,<n>aren't we?
I've never been here<n>befo—

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's quite a steep hill up ahead!<n>Look at
how much the path twists and<n>turns too... Not to
mention the wind!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea this was here. I bet it<n>would make a
perfect place for<n>training...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Um... Have you been using this area<n>as a training
location, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for showing me such an<n>invaluable
place!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about<n>implementing a new
training regimen<n>for Meek, so this is perfect
timing!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I really can't thank you enough!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so modest! I won't let this<n>favor go to
waste! Forgive my<n>eagerness, but—

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I'm going to give it a try now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All of a sudden, Kiryuin begins to run<n>up the slope
in a fine display of<n>athleticism.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She's back by my side in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hm... It's less slippery than I thought.<n>So maybe...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This time she takes off in a different<n>direction...
but the path is blocked in<n>multiple places by fallen
trees!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Phew! This is great!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I only ran through some preliminary<n>exercises,
but... I was able to confirm<n>almost everything that
I needed!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Those fallen trees are the perfect<n>height for
jumping over, and the soil is<n>firm enough for
safe landings!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing especially dangerous<n>out here,
so this is the perfect place to<n>train!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you! This is also thanks to<n>the
Trainer's Handbook!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Train not only your mind, but also<n>your body.
There is much to be<n>learned from honing your
physique.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I was a kid, I've played<n>every sport
you can imagine and put<n>that wisdom to use.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm far from a professional athlete, of<n>course.
Nor am I a match for an<n>Umamusume when it
comes to<n>running.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But I believe I've learned enough to<n>pass on my
experience.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: N-not at all... I'm still just a novice,<n>really...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But it makes me happy to hear such<n>praise from
a contemporary.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I promise I won't disappoint you. I'll<n>continue to
work hard from now on!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, thank you for showing me<n>this place!
Once I get home, I'm going<n>to work on that
training regimen!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I'll be sure to share it with<n>you once I'm
done!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Trainer Kiryuin shares<n>her new
special training regime with<n>me, just like she
promised.
